requirement_topic.zh: EMC 发射——照明设备（ES / IEC-CISPR 15）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC 發射——照明設備（ES / IEC-CISPR 15）

summary.en: Where electromagnetic compatibility is assessed for lighting equipment entering Ethiopia, the applicable reference is the ESA-adopted Ethiopian Standard based on CISPR 15 （Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment）, covering conducted emissions （150 kHz–30 MHz） and radiated emissions. ESA adopts the IEC / CISPR text as a national ES standard. Unlike the EU, Ethiopia does not operate a single horizontal EMC Directive with a self-declared CE-style mark; EMC requirements, where they apply to regulated lighting products, are verified through CACEA / Ministry of Trade conformity assessment and import inspection coordinated with the in-country importer. Note: EMC emission limits may not be enforced for every lighting category — confirm scope against the current regulated-product list. Radio / wireless emissions from smart luminaires are handled separately by the Ethiopian Communications Authority （ECA）, see ledet-rohs-03.
summary.zh: 在对进入埃塞俄比亚的照明设备评定电磁兼容性时，适用参考为 ESA 采用、基于 CISPR 15（电气照明及类似设备无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法）的埃塞俄比亚标准，涵盖传导发射（150 kHz–30 MHz）及辐射发射。ESA 将该 IEC / CISPR 文本采为国家 ES 标准。与欧盟不同，埃塞俄比亚不设单一横向 EMC 指令及 CE 式自我声明标志；EMC 要求在适用于受管制照明产品时，通过与在地进口商协调的 CACEA / 贸易部合格评定与进口检验核实。注意：EMC 发射限值未必对每一照明类别均强制执行——请依据现行受管制产品清单确认范围。智能灯具的无线电 / 无线发射由埃塞俄比亚通信管理局（ECA）单独处理，见 ledet-rohs-03。
summary.zht: 在對進入衣索比亞的照明設備評定電磁兼容性時，適用參考為 ESA 採用、基於 CISPR 15（電氣照明及類似設備無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法）的衣索比亞標準，涵蓋傳導發射（150 kHz–30 MHz）及輻射發射。ESA 將該 IEC / CISPR 文本採為國家 ES 標準。與歐盟不同，衣索比亞不設單一橫向 EMC 指令及 CE 式自我聲明標誌；EMC 要求在適用於受管制照明產品時，通過與在地進口商協調的 CACEA / 貿易部合格評定與進口檢驗核實。注意：EMC 發射限值未必對每一照明類別均強制執行——請依據現行受管制產品清單確認範圍。智能燈具的無線電 / 無線發射由衣索比亞通信管理局（ECA）單獨處理，見 ledet-rohs-03。

standards_or_laws: ESA-adopted Ethiopian Standard equivalent to CISPR 15 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment
CACEA / Ministry of Trade conformity assessment and import inspection for regulated products

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 17743-2017 （Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment）, technically aligned with CISPR 15. For luminaires sold in China, GB 17743 compliance is part of CCC certification （which covers safety and EMC for relevant categories）, with testing at CNAS / CMA-accredited laboratories. Because Ethiopia also adopts CISPR 15, the emission limits are closely aligned, but Chinese CCC EMC reports are not automatically accepted for Ethiopian import and must fit the CACEA / Ministry of Trade conformity route.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 17743-2017（电气照明及类似设备无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），技术上与 CISPR 15 对齐。在中国销售的灯具须符合 GB 17743，作为 CCC 认证（涵盖相关类别安全和 EMC）的组成部分，检测在 CNAS / CMA 认可实验室进行。由于埃塞俄比亚同样采用 CISPR 15，发射限值高度一致，但中国 CCC EMC 报告不自动被埃塞俄比亚进口接受，须纳入 CACEA / 贸易部合格评定路径。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 17743-2017（電氣照明及類似設備無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），技術上與 CISPR 15 對齊。在中國銷售的燈具須符合 GB 17743，作為 CCC 認證（涵蓋相關類別安全和 EMC）的組成部分，檢測在 CNAS / CMA 認可實驗室進行。由於衣索比亞同樣採用 CISPR 15，發射限值高度一致，但中國 CCC EMC 報告不自動被衣索比亞進口接受，須納入 CACEA / 貿易部合格評定路徑。

standards_or_laws: GB 17743-2017 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment （SAC/SAMR, aligned with CISPR 15）

gap.en: Both Ethiopia （ESA-adopted CISPR 15） and China （GB 17743） derive from CISPR 15, so emission limits are closely harmonised and the test content rarely needs to change. The differences are procedural and scope-related: （1） Ethiopia has no single horizontal EMC Directive and no self-declared CE-style mark — where EMC applies to a regulated lighting product it is verified through CACEA / Ministry of Trade conformity assessment and import inspection with the in-country importer; （2） EMC may not be enforced for every lighting category, so confirm whether the specific product is in scope; （3） test reports should be from a laboratory accepted by the Ethiopian scheme （ILAC-recognised）; （4） wireless / smart luminaire radio emissions are regulated separately by the ECA, not by the lighting-EMC standard. Confirm EMC scope and accepted test evidence with CACEA / ESA before shipment.
gap.zh: 埃塞俄比亚（ESA 采用 CISPR 15）与中国（GB 17743）均源自 CISPR 15，发射限值高度协调，试验内容通常无需改动。差异在于流程与范围：（1）埃塞俄比亚无单一横向 EMC 指令及 CE 式自我声明标志——EMC 适用于受管制照明产品时，经与在地进口商协调的 CACEA / 贸易部合格评定与进口检验核实；（2）EMC 未必对每一照明类别强制执行，故请确认具体产品是否在范围内；（3）检测报告应来自埃塞俄比亚方案接受的实验室（ILAC 认可）；（4）无线 / 智能灯具无线电发射由 ECA 单独管理，而非照明 EMC 标准。出货前请向 CACEA / ESA 确认 EMC 范围及接受的检测证据。
gap.zht: 衣索比亞（ESA 採用 CISPR 15）與中國（GB 17743）均源自 CISPR 15，發射限值高度協調，試驗內容通常無需改動。差異在於流程與範圍：（1）衣索比亞無單一橫向 EMC 指令及 CE 式自我聲明標誌——EMC 適用於受管制照明產品時，經與在地進口商協調的 CACEA / 貿易部合格評定與進口檢驗核實；（2）EMC 未必對每一照明類別強制執行，故請確認具體產品是否在範圍內；（3）檢測報告應來自衣索比亞方案接受的實驗室（ILAC 認可）；（4）無線 / 智能燈具無線電發射由 ECA 單獨管理，而非照明 EMC 標準。出貨前請向 CACEA / ESA 確認 EMC 範圍及接受的檢測證據。

mandatory_status.target: Scope-dependent — where EMC applies to a regulated lighting product, ESA-adopted CISPR 15 emission limits are verified via CACEA / Ministry of Trade conformity assessment and import inspection; confirm whether the specific product category is in scope
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 17743-2017 compliance required as part of CCC certification for luminaires sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Lighting-equipment EMC emissions for Ethiopia are assessed against the ESA-adopted Ethiopian Standard based on CISPR 15 — the same base as China's GB 17743, so limits are closely aligned. Ethiopia has no single horizontal EMC Directive or self-declared CE-style mark; where EMC applies to a regulated product it is verified through CACEA / Ministry of Trade conformity assessment and import inspection with the in-country importer, and EMC may not be enforced for every lighting category. Radio emissions from smart luminaires are handled separately by the ECA. Confirm scope and accepted laboratories with CACEA / ESA before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 埃塞俄比亚照明设备 EMC 发射依据 ESA 采用、基于 CISPR 15 的埃塞俄比亚标准评定——与中国 GB 17743 同一基础，限值高度一致。埃塞俄比亚无单一横向 EMC 指令或 CE 式自我声明标志；EMC 适用于受管制产品时，经与在地进口商协调的 CACEA / 贸易部合格评定与进口检验核实，且 EMC 未必对每一照明类别强制执行。智能灯具无线电发射由 ECA 单独处理。出货前请向 CACEA / ESA 确认范围及接受的实验室。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 衣索比亞照明設備 EMC 發射依據 ESA 採用、基於 CISPR 15 的衣索比亞標準評定——與中國 GB 17743 同一基礎，限值高度一致。衣索比亞無單一橫向 EMC 指令或 CE 式自我聲明標誌；EMC 適用於受管制產品時，經與在地進口商協調的 CACEA / 貿易部合格評定與進口檢驗核實，且 EMC 未必對每一照明類別強制執行。智能燈具無線電發射由 ECA 單獨處理。出貨前請向 CACEA / ESA 確認範圍及接受的實驗室。

requirement_topic.zh: EMC 抗扰度——照明设备（ES / IEC 61547）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC 抗擾度——照明設備（ES / IEC 61547）

summary.en: Where EMC immunity is assessed for lighting equipment in Ethiopia, the reference is the ESA-adopted Ethiopian Standard based on IEC 61547 （Equipment for general lighting purposes — EMC immunity requirements）, covering electrostatic discharge, electrical fast transient / burst, surge, conducted RF disturbances, power-frequency magnetic field, and voltage dips / interruptions. ESA adopts the IEC text as a national ES standard. Immunity is typically the least strictly enforced EMC aspect for general lighting; in Ethiopia, as in many adopting jurisdictions, immunity testing is often not mandated for every luminaire category. Where it applies to a regulated product, evidence is presented through the CACEA / Ministry of Trade conformity assessment and import inspection coordinated with the in-country importer.
summary.zh: 在埃塞俄比亚对照明设备评定 EMC 抗扰度时，参考为 ESA 采用、基于 IEC 61547（一般照明设备——EMC 抗扰度要求）的埃塞俄比亚标准，涵盖静电放电、电快速瞬变 / 脉冲群、浪涌、传导射频骚扰、工频磁场及电压暂降 / 中断。ESA 将该 IEC 文本采为国家 ES 标准。抗扰度通常是通用照明 EMC 中执行力度最弱的方面；在埃塞俄比亚，与许多采标司法辖区相同，抗扰度检测往往未必对每一灯具类别强制要求。在适用于受管制产品时，证据通过与在地进口商协调的 CACEA / 贸易部合格评定与进口检验提交。
summary.zht: 在衣索比亞對照明設備評定 EMC 抗擾度時，參考為 ESA 採用、基於 IEC 61547（一般照明設備——EMC 抗擾度要求）的衣索比亞標準，涵蓋靜電放電、電快速瞬變 / 脈衝群、浪湧、傳導射頻騷擾、工頻磁場及電壓暫降 / 中斷。ESA 將該 IEC 文本採為國家 ES 標準。抗擾度通常是通用照明 EMC 中執行力度最弱的方面；在衣索比亞，與許多採標司法轄區相同，抗擾度檢測往往未必對每一燈具類別強制要求。在適用於受管制產品時，證據通過與在地進口商協調的 CACEA / 貿易部合格評定與進口檢驗提交。

standards_or_laws: ESA-adopted Ethiopian Standard equivalent to IEC 61547 — Equipment for general lighting purposes — EMC immunity requirements
CACEA / Ministry of Trade conformity assessment and import inspection for regulated products

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB/T 18595-2014 （General requirements for the electromagnetic immunity of lighting equipment）, technically equivalent to IEC 61547. GB/T 18595 is a recommended standard （T = tuijian） and is less strictly enforced than the CN emissions standard GB 17743; CCC certification for CN luminaires focuses more on safety and emissions than immunity. Because both Ethiopia and China build on IEC 61547, a product tested to GB/T 18595 will generally meet the Ethiopian immunity reference.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB/T 18595-2014（照明设备的电磁抗扰度要求），技术上等同于 IEC 61547。GB/T 18595 为推荐性标准（T = 推荐），执行力度弱于中国发射标准 GB 17743；中国灯具 CCC 认证更侧重安全和发射而非抗扰度。由于埃塞俄比亚与中国同以 IEC 61547 为基础，按 GB/T 18595 检测的产品通常能满足埃塞俄比亚抗扰度参考。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB/T 18595-2014（照明設備的電磁抗擾度要求），技術上等同於 IEC 61547。GB/T 18595 為推薦性標準（T = 推薦），執行力度弱於中國發射標準 GB 17743；中國燈具 CCC 認證更側重安全和發射而非抗擾度。由於衣索比亞與中國同以 IEC 61547 為基礎，按 GB/T 18595 檢測的產品通常能滿足衣索比亞抗擾度參考。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18595-2014 — General requirements for the electromagnetic immunity of lighting equipment （SAC/SAMR — recommended standard, aligned with IEC 61547）

gap.en: Immunity content is shared （IEC 61547） between Ethiopia （ESA-adopted） and China （GB/T 18595）, so re-testing is rarely a technical barrier. Both jurisdictions treat immunity lightly: in China GB/T 18595 is a recommended standard not universally enforced, and in Ethiopia immunity is often not mandated for every luminaire category. The practical gap is mainly documentary — if a regulated product is in scope, the Ethiopian conformity file should include immunity evidence from a laboratory accepted by the CACEA / Ministry of Trade scheme （ILAC-recognised）. Chinese CCC documentation may not include immunity reports. Confirm whether immunity is required for the specific product and which laboratory evidence is accepted with CACEA / ESA before shipment.
gap.zh: 抗扰度内容（IEC 61547）在埃塞俄比亚（ESA 采用）与中国（GB/T 18595）之间共享，故重新检测很少构成技术障碍。两地对抗扰度均较为宽松：中国 GB/T 18595 为推荐性标准、未普遍执行，埃塞俄比亚抗扰度往往未必对每一灯具类别强制要求。实际差距主要为文件性——若受管制产品在范围内，埃塞俄比亚合格评定文件应包含来自 CACEA / 贸易部方案接受的实验室（ILAC 认可）的抗扰度证据。中国 CCC 文件可能不含抗扰度报告。出货前请向 CACEA / ESA 确认具体产品是否需要抗扰度及接受何种实验室证据。
gap.zht: 抗擾度內容（IEC 61547）在衣索比亞（ESA 採用）與中國（GB/T 18595）之間共享，故重新檢測很少構成技術障礙。兩地對抗擾度均較為寬鬆：中國 GB/T 18595 為推薦性標準、未普遍執行，衣索比亞抗擾度往往未必對每一燈具類別強制要求。實際差距主要為文件性——若受管制產品在範圍內，衣索比亞合格評定文件應包含來自 CACEA / 貿易部方案接受的實驗室（ILAC 認可）的抗擾度證據。中國 CCC 文件可能不含抗擾度報告。出貨前請向 CACEA / ESA 確認具體產品是否需要抗擾度及接受何種實驗室證據。

mandatory_status.target: Often not mandated — ESA-adopted IEC 61547 immunity is frequently not enforced for every luminaire category; where a regulated product is in scope, immunity evidence is presented via CACEA / Ministry of Trade conformity assessment. Confirm with CACEA / the in-country importer
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended — GB/T 18595-2014 is a recommended （non-mandatory） standard; immunity testing is not universally enforced for all luminaire categories under CCC

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC immunity for lighting in Ethiopia references the ESA-adopted Ethiopian Standard based on IEC 61547 — the same base as China's GB/T 18595. Both jurisdictions enforce immunity lightly: it is a recommended standard in China and often not mandated for every category in Ethiopia. Where a regulated product is in scope, immunity evidence should be in the CACEA / Ministry of Trade conformity file from an accepted laboratory. Products already tested to GB/T 18595 generally meet the Ethiopian reference. Confirm scope and accepted evidence with CACEA / ESA before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 埃塞俄比亚照明 EMC 抗扰度参考 ESA 采用、基于 IEC 61547 的埃塞俄比亚标准——与中国 GB/T 18595 同一基础。两地对抗扰度执行均较宽松：中国为推荐性标准，埃塞俄比亚往往未必对每一类别强制要求。若受管制产品在范围内，抗扰度证据应来自接受的实验室并纳入 CACEA / 贸易部合格评定文件。已按 GB/T 18595 检测的产品通常能满足埃塞俄比亚参考。出货前请向 CACEA / ESA 确认范围及接受的证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 衣索比亞照明 EMC 抗擾度參考 ESA 採用、基於 IEC 61547 的衣索比亞標準——與中國 GB/T 18595 同一基礎。兩地對抗擾度執行均較寬鬆：中國為推薦性標準，衣索比亞往往未必對每一類別強制要求。若受管制產品在範圍內，抗擾度證據應來自接受的實驗室並納入 CACEA / 貿易部合格評定文件。已按 GB/T 18595 檢測的產品通常能滿足衣索比亞參考。出貨前請向 CACEA / ESA 確認範圍及接受的證據。
